changes.title: Bottom bar generation fix
changes.description: Apply AI results with applyGeneratedLayout + POST /api/ai/generate (removed invalid addNodesToCanvas). Optional refine path: when canvas has nodes and message looks like an edit, POST /api/ai/chat for partial updates (generate-intent.ts).

changes.title: On-canvas AI build progress
changes.description: aiBuild store state; ticker + pushAiBuildStatus; overlay on canvas (spinner + live log, aria-live). Wired from bottom prompt and Components panel generate/extract flows. Overlay uses rgba background for browser compatibility.

changes.title: Layout accuracy & anti-template
changes.description: Fixed isLayoutMinimal (recursive content count). PRIORITY user block; trimmed JSON shape reference for cloud; tuned tokens/temperature; Ollama prompt order and shorter num_predict. Keyword-aware inferFallbackCards + titleFromUserPrompt.

changes.title: Elite FAST pipeline (single-call)
changes.description: System prompt: archetype-style regions, anti-repetition, expand short prompts. Archetype keyword routes (chatbot, ecommerce, landing, etc.). STYLE_VARIATIONS + hash for distinct palettes/structure per prompt. New generate-intent helpers for greenfield vs patch.

changes.title: Layout refiner — partial regeneration
changes.description: REFINE_SYSTEM_PROMPT emphasizes edit-in-place, preserve unrelated UI, full rebuild only when explicit. maxTokens 8192 → 4096 for speed.

changes.title: Adapter improvements
changes.description: Map semantic types (sidebar, card, navbar, hero, modal, settings, topbar) to CONTAINER with variant for correct editor styling; use getValidIconName() for icon validation; fix TOPBAR variant to use variant: 'topbar' instead of 'navbar'

changes.title: ComponentsPanel enhancements
changes.description: Replace vs Append toggle (default: Append); Theme selector (Light/Dark); Model selector (GPT-4o, GPT-4o Mini, GPT-4 Turbo); Retry button on error; Loading skeleton during generation

changes.title: EditorShell append/replace modes
changes.description: Append mode: viewport-aware positioning; Replace mode: replace canvas contents

changes.title: Prompt parser theme support
changes.description: Added theme (light/dark) from prompt or UI; Added parsePromptWithOptions() for theme override

changes.title: Layout generator improvements
changes.description: Dark/light theme support with theme colors; 30s timeout for OpenAI calls; clearTimeout on all early-return paths to avoid timer leaks; Fallback layouts for login, form, table, pricing, settings, gallery, modal

changes.title: Rules engine overlap resolution
changes.description: Iterative overlap resolution until no overlaps remain (instead of single pass); Bounds validation so children stay within parent

changes.title: API route enhancements
changes.description: Rate limiting (20 requests per minute); Coral as fallback when no OPENAI_API_KEY; Accepts model and style in request body; Clearer error messages including timeout

changes.title: EditorShell broken imports
changes.description: Fixed ComponentsPanel, PropertiesPanel, PreviewPanel imports from ./ComponentsPanel etc. to @/components/editor-v2/ComponentsPanel

changes.title: Build script
changes.description: Added --webpack to build script to avoid Turbopack/WASM issues

changes.title: Timeout leak in layout-generator
changes.description: Added clearTimeout(timeoutId) before each early return (API error, empty content, parse failure)

changes.title: TOPBAR variant mismatch
changes.description: TOPBAR nodes no longer receive variant: 'navbar'; variant set only for CONTAINER types

changes.title: Overlap resolution iteration
changes.description: Replaced single-pass overlap fix with iterative loop until no overlaps remain, with iteration limit to avoid infinite loops

changes.title: DynamicIcon fallback prop
changes.description: Added fallback prop to all DynamicIcon usages to prevent '[lucide-react]: Name in Lucide DynamicIcon not found' console errors; CanvasNode uses getValidIconName() with proper top-level import
